# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL to download the build artifact from (e.g., https://artifactory.example.com/releases/app-1.0.tar.gz)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM', description: 'Expected SHA-256 checksum of the artifact')
        choice(name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT', choices: ['staging', 'production'], description: 'Target deployment environment')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', description: 'Comma-separated list of server hostnames to deploy to (e.g., prod-web-01,prod-web-02)')
        string(name: 'APP_NAME', description: 'Application name for deployment path')
        string(name: 'APP_VERSION', description: 'Application version tag')
        booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'Perform a dry run without actual deployment')
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_BASE_PATH = '/opt/deployments'
        ALLOWED_URL_PREFIXES = 'https://artifactory.example.com/,https://s3.amazonaws.com/mycompany-artifacts/,https://releases.internal.example.com/'
        ALLOWED_SERVERS_PATTERN = '^prod-(web|app|api)-\\d{2}$'
        DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS_ID = 'deploy-ssh-key'
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    downloadArtifact()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyArtifactChecksum()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Security Scan') {
            steps {
                script {
                    scanArtifact()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    equals expected: 'production', actual: params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT
                    equals expected: false, actual: params.DRY_RUN
                }
            }
            steps {
                timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                    input message: "Deploy ${params.APP_NAME} v${params.APP_VERSION} to production servers: ${params.DEPLOY_SERVERS}?",
                          ok: 'Deploy',
                          submitter: 'deploy-approvers'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    deployToServers()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyDeployment()
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
            script {
                def status = currentBuild.currentResult
                echo "Pipeline completed with status: ${status}"
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment of ${params.APP_NAME} v${params.APP_VERSION} to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} completed successfully."
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment of ${params.APP_NAME} v${params.APP_VERSION} to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} FAILED."
        }
    }
}

def validateParameters() {
    echo 'Validating input parameters...'

    // Validate ARTIFACT_URL - must be HTTPS and from allowed sources
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
        error 'ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required.'
    }

    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()

    // Enforce HTTPS only
    if (!artifactUrl.startsWith('https://')) {
        error "ARTIFACT_URL must use HTTPS. Provided URL: ${artifactUrl}"
    }

    // Validate against allowlist of URL prefixes to prevent SSRF and arbitrary downloads
    def allowedPrefixes = env.ALLOWED_URL_PREFIXES.split(',')
    def urlAllowed = allowedPrefixes.any { prefix -> artifactUrl.startsWith(prefix.trim()) }
    if (!urlAllowed) {
        error "ARTIFACT_URL is not from an allowed source. Allowed prefixes: ${env.ALLOWED_URL_PREFIXES}. Provided: ${artifactUrl}"
    }

    // Reject URLs with suspicious patterns (path traversal, encoded chars, fragments, userinfo)
    if (artifactUrl.contains('..') || artifactUrl.contains('%2e') || artifactUrl.contains('%2E')) {
        error 'ARTIFACT_URL contains path traversal sequences.'
    }
    if (artifactUrl.contains('@')) {
        error 'ARTIFACT_URL must not contain userinfo (@ symbol).'
    }

    // Parse URL to validate structure and prevent DNS rebinding / IP-based SSRF
    try {
        def parsedUrl = new java.net.URL(artifactUrl)
        def host = parsedUrl.getHost()
        if (!host || host.matches('.*\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+.*')) {
            // Disallow raw IP addresses to prevent SSRF to internal networks
            error "ARTIFACT_URL must use a hostname, not an IP address. Host: ${host}"
        }
        if (host == 'localhost' || host.endsWith('.local') || host == '127.0.0.1' || host == '[::1]') {
            error "ARTIFACT_URL must not point to localhost or local addresses."
        }
    } catch (java.net.MalformedURLException e) {
        error "ARTIFACT_URL is malformed: ${e.message}"
    }

    // Validate ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM - must be a valid SHA-256 hex string
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
        error 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM parameter is required for integrity verification.'
    }
    def checksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim()
    if (!checksum.matches('^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$')) {
        error "ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA-256 hex string (64 hex characters). Provided: ${checksum}"
    }

    // Validate APP_NAME - alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only
    if (!params.APP_NAME?.trim()) {
        error 'APP_NAME parameter is required.'
    }
    def appName = params.APP_NAME.trim()
    if (!appName.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$')) {
        error "APP_NAME must be alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores only (max 64 chars). Provided: ${appName}"
    }

    // Validate APP_VERSION - semver-like pattern
    if (!params.APP_VERSION?.trim()) {
        error 'APP_VERSION parameter is required.'
    }
    def appVersion = params.APP_VERSION.trim()
    if (!appVersion.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{1,32}$')) {
        error "APP_VERSION must match pattern [a-zA-Z0-9._-] (max 32 chars). Provided: ${appVersion}"
    }

    // Validate DEPLOY_SERVERS - each server must match allowed pattern
    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
        error 'DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required.'
    }
    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
    if (servers.isEmpty()) {
        error 'DEPLOY_SERVERS must contain at least one server.'
    }
    if (servers.size() > 20) {
        error 'DEPLOY_SERVERS must not exceed 20 servers.'
    }

    def serverPattern = env.ALLOWED_SERVERS_PATTERN
    servers.each { server ->
        if (!server.matches(serverPattern)) {
            error "Server '${server}' does not match allowed pattern: ${serverPattern}"
        }
    }

    echo "All parameters validated successfully."
    echo "  Artifact URL: ${artifactUrl}"
    echo "  Checksum: ${checksum}"
    echo "  App: ${appName} v${appVersion}"
    echo "  Target: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
    echo "  Servers: ${servers.join(', ')}"
    echo "  Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
}

def downloadArtifact() {
    echo "Downloading artifact from: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"

    sh "mkdir -p '${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}'"

    // Derive a safe filename from the URL
    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
    def urlPath = new java.net.URL(artifactUrl).getPath()
    def originalFilename = urlPath.tokenize('/').last()

    // Sanitize filename to prevent path traversal
    def safeFilename = originalFilename.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]', '_')
    if (!safeFilename || safeFilename.startsWith('.')) {
        safeFilename = "artifact_${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
    }
    // Limit filename length
    if (safeFilename.length() > 128) {
        safeFilename = safeFilename.substring(0, 128)
    }

    env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME = safeFilename
    def artifactPath = "${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}/${safeFilename}"
    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = artifactPath

    // Use withCredentials for authenticated downloads if needed
    // The URL is already validated against the allowlist
    withCredentials([string(credentialsId: 'artifact-download-token', variable: 'DOWNLOAD_TOKEN')]) {
        // Use curl with security flags:
        // --fail: fail on HTTP errors
        // --location: follow redirects (limited)
        // --max-redirs 3: limit redirects to prevent redirect-based SSRF
        // --max-time 300: timeout
        // --proto =https: only allow HTTPS
        // --no-netrc: don't use .netrc
        // -o: output to specific file
        sh """
            curl --fail \
                 --location \
                 --max-redirs 3 \
                 --max-time 300 \
                 --proto '=https' \
                 --no-netrc \
                 --silent \
                 --show-error \
                 -H "Authorization: Bearer \${DOWNLOAD_TOKEN}" \
                 -o '${artifactPath}' \
                 '${artifactUrl}'
        """
    }

    // Verify the file was downloaded and has content
    sh """
        if [ ! -f '${artifactPath}' ]; then
            echo 'ERROR: Artifact file was not created.'
            exit 1
        fi
        FILE_SIZE=\$(stat -c%s '${artifactPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${artifactPath}')
        if [ "\${FILE_SIZE}" -eq 0 ]; then
            echo 'ERROR: Downloaded artifact is empty.'
            exit 1
        fi
        echo "Downloaded artifact: ${safeFilename} (\${FILE_SIZE} bytes)"
    """
}

def verifyArtifactChecksum() {
    echo 'Verifying artifact integrity with SHA-256 checksum...'

    def expectedChecksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim().toLowerCase()
    def artifactPath = env.ARTIFACT_PATH

    // Compute SHA-256 and compare
    def actualChecksum = sh(
        script: "sha256sum '${artifactPath}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim().toLowerCase()

    echo "Expected checksum: ${expectedChecksum}"
    echo "Actual checksum:   ${actualChecksum}"

    if (actualChecksum != expectedChecksum) {
        // Remove the compromised artifact immediately
        sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
        error "CHECKSUM MISMATCH! Artifact integrity verification failed. The artifact may have been tampered with. Expected: ${expectedChecksum}, Got: ${actualChecksum}"
    }

    echo 'Checksum verification passed.'
}

def scanArtifact() {
    echo 'Running security scan on artifact...'

    def artifactPath = env.ARTIFACT_PATH

    // Check file type to ensure it's an expected archive format
    def fileType = sh(
        script: "file --brief '${artifactPath}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim()

    echo "Detected file type: ${fileType}"

    // Only allow expected archive types
    def allowedTypes = ['gzip compressed', 'Zip archive', 'tar archive', 'XZ compressed']
    def typeAllowed = allowedTypes.any { type -> fileType.toLowerCase().contains(type.toLowerCase()) }
    if (!typeAllowed) {
        error "Artifact file type '${fileType}' is not in the allowed list: ${allowedTypes.join(', ')}"
    }

    // Run ClamAV scan if available
    def clamavAvailable = sh(script: 'which clamscan 2>/dev/null', returnStatus: true) == 0
    if (clamavAvailable) {
        echo 'Running ClamAV scan...'
        def scanResult = sh(
            script: "clamscan --no-summary '${artifactPath}'",
            returnStatus: true
        )
        if (scanResult != 0) {
            sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
            error 'ClamAV detected a threat in the artifact!'
        }
        echo 'ClamAV scan passed.'
    } else {
        echo 'WARNING: ClamAV not available. Skipping virus scan.'
    }

    echo 'Security scan completed.'
}

def deployToServers() {
    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
    def appName = params.APP_NAME.trim()
    def appVersion = params.APP_VERSION.trim()
    def artifactPath = env.ARTIFACT_PATH
    def artifactFilename = env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME
    def deployBasePath = env.DEPLOY_BASE_PATH
    def dryRun = params.DRY_RUN

    // Construct deployment path safely - inputs already validated
    def deployPath = "${deployBasePath}/${appName}/${appVersion}"
    def currentLink = "${deployBasePath}/${appName}/current"

    echo "Deploying ${appName} v${appVersion} to ${servers.size()} server(s)..."
    echo "Deploy path: ${deployPath}"

    if (dryRun) {
        echo '*** DRY RUN MODE - No actual deployment will be performed ***'
    }

    def deployResults = [:]

    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: env.DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS_ID, keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY', usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
        for (server in servers) {
            echo "Deploying to ${server}..."

            try {
                if (dryRun) {
                    echo "[DRY RUN] Would deploy to ${server}:${deployPath}"
                    deployResults[server] = 'DRY_RUN_OK'
                } else {
                    // Create deployment directory on remote server
                    sh """
                        ssh -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "mkdir -p '${deployPath}'"
                    """

                    // Upload artifact via SCP
                    sh """
                        scp -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            '${artifactPath}' \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}:${deployPath}/${artifactFilename}"
                    """

                    // Extract artifact and update symlink atomically
                    sh """
                        ssh -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "cd '${deployPath}' && \
                             tar xzf '${artifactFilename}' && \
                             rm -f '${artifactFilename}' && \
                             ln -sfn '${deployPath}' '${currentLink}'"
                    """

                    echo "Successfully deployed to ${server}"
                    deployResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                echo "ERROR: Failed to deploy to ${server}: ${e.message}"
                deployResults[server] = 'FAILED'
            }
        }
    }

    // Report results
    echo '=== Deployment Results ==='
    deployResults.each { server, result ->
        echo "  ${server}: ${result}"
    }

    def failedServers = deployResults.findAll { it.value == 'FAILED' }
    if (failedServers) {
        error "Deployment failed on ${failedServers.size()} server(s): ${failedServers.keySet().join(', ')}"
    }

    echo 'All deployments completed successfully.'
}

def verifyDeployment() {
    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
    def appName = params.APP_NAME.trim()
    def deployBasePath = env.DEPLOY_BASE_PATH
    def currentLink = "${deployBasePath}/${appName}/current"
    def dryRun = params.DRY_RUN

    if (dryRun) {
        echo '[DRY RUN] Skipping deployment verification.'
        return
    }

    echo 'Verifying deployment on all servers...'

    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: env.DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS_ID, keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY', usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
        for (server in servers) {
            echo "Verifying deployment on ${server}..."

            // Check that the current symlink exists and points to the correct version
            def verifyResult = sh(
                script: """
                    ssh -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "test -L '${currentLink}' && readlink '${currentLink}'"
                """,
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()

            echo "  ${server}: current -> ${verifyResult}"

            def expectedPath = "${deployBasePath}/${appName}/${params.APP_VERSION.trim()}"
            if (verifyResult != expectedPath) {
                error "Verification failed on ${server}: symlink points to '${verifyResult}' instead of '${expectedPath}'"
            }

            // Optional: run a health check endpoint if applicable
            echo "  ${server}: Deployment verified successfully."
        }
    }

    echo 'All deployment verifications passed.'
}
